name: ROYAL CARIBBEAN CRUISES LTD
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. is a vacation industry leader operating three global cruise brands: Royal Caribbean (world's largest cruise brand, 29 ships, ~111,000 berths), Celebrity Cruises (15 ships, ~38,900 berths), and Silversea (ultra-luxury/expedition, 12 ships, ~5,500 berths). The company also holds a 50% joint venture interest in TUI Cruises GmbH, operating TUI Cruises and Hapag-Lloyd Cruises. Together, all brands operate 69 ships with ~179,720 berths, calling on 1,000+ destinations across all seven continents.

products.name: Royal Caribbean
products.description: Contemporary and premium cruise brand offering worldwide itineraries, operating 29 ships with ~111,000 berths.

products.name: Celebrity Cruises
products.description: Premium cruise brand with destination-rich experiences on upscale ships, operating 15 ships with ~38,900 berths.

products.name: Silversea
products.description: Ultra-luxury and expedition cruise brand featuring smaller ships and exotic itineraries, operating 12 ships with ~5,500 berths.

products.name: TUI Cruises
products.description: German contemporary cruise brand operated by 50%-owned joint venture TUIC, with 8 ships and ~22,700 berths.

products.name: Hapag-Lloyd Cruises
products.description: German luxury and expedition cruise brand operated by TUIC joint venture, with 5 ships and ~1,620 berths.

products.name: Perfect Day Collection
products.description: Portfolio of private land-based destinations operated by Royal Caribbean Group.

products.name: Royal Beach Club Collection
products.description: Private land-based destination portfolio complementing cruise offerings.

products.name: Celebrity River Cruises
products.description: Premium river cruise vacation brand launched in 2025 with initial order of 10 ships, expanding to 20 vessels.

partnerships.description: 50/50 joint venture (TUIC) operating TUI Cruises and Hapag-Lloyd Cruises brands targeting the German cruise market.
